0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"First Steps"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"A hands-on walkthrough of Mnemosyne's core operations."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"1. Initialize Memory"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\nmem = Memory()\nprint(f&quot;Initialized: {mem.db_path}&quot;)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"2. Store Information"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Simple memory\nmem.remember(&quot;Alice is a backend engineer who prefers Go over Python.&quot;)\n\n# Structured memory with metadata\nmem.remember(\n  content=&quot;Project deadline moved to Friday.&quot;,\n  tags=[&quot;project-alpha&quot;, &quot;deadline&quot;],\n  importance=0.8,\n  source=&quot;slack&quot;,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"3. Recall Information"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Semantic search\nresults = mem.recall(&quot;What programming language does Alice prefer?&quot;)\n\n# Filtered search\nresults = mem.recall(\n  query=&quot;deadline&quot;,\n  tags=[&quot;project-alpha&quot;],\n  since=&quot;2026-04-01&quot;,\n)\n\n# Access a specific memory by ID\nmemory = mem.get(&quot;mem_abc123&quot;)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"4. Update and Delete"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Update a memory\nmem.update(&quot;mem_abc123&quot;, content=&quot;Deadline moved to Monday.&quot;)\n\n# Delete a memory\nmem.forget(&quot;mem_abc123&quot;)\n\n# Bulk delete by tag\nmem.forget_all(tags=[&quot;temp&quot;])\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"5. Inspect Memory State"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Statistics\nstats = mem.stats()\nprint(f&quot;Working: {stats.working_count}&quot;)\nprint(f&quot;Episodic: {stats.episodic_count}&quot;)\nprint(f&quot;Database size: {stats.db_size_mb:.1f} MB&quot;)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"You're Ready"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["You've learned the core CRUD operations.
